title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Durian Furniture

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Durian Furniture
jsonLd.description:
We at Durian Furniture are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Durian Furniture:
Durian Furniture is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Durian Furniture!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
